archive_data.question_text: In karate, the fight starts when the referee shouts "______".

explanation.english: In karate, the referee uses the command 'Shobu Hajime' to start the fight. 'Yame' means stop, 'Kaizen' means continuous improvement, and 'Yuko' is a scoring term.
explanation.tanglish: Karate-sil sandai thodangum bothu, referee 'Shobu Hajime' endra variyai solgaiyal thodappikkappadum. Yame endral niruthu, Kaizen endral thodar melanmai, Yuko endraal varutha kanakku.

archive_data.question_text: Who decides the disqualification of members of State Legislative Assembly, for matters other than those in the Tenth Schedule of the Constitution of India?

explanation.english: Under Article 192 of the Constitution of India, the Governor decides the disqualification of members of the State Legislative Assembly for matters other than those under the Tenth Schedule (anti-defection).
explanation.tanglish: Bharatha arasangathin 192-am seyyaku anusarippa, Govarnar thaan maanila sutrasaabaiyinarudaiya senneerthai kurithu nirnayam seyvar. Idhu pathaam anusuchiyil (Tenth Schedule) illatha vishayangalukkuriyathu.

archive_data.question_text: Who among the following received the Padma Shri in 2022 for performing the Rai folk dance form of Madhya Pradesh?

explanation.english: Ram Sahay Pandey was awarded the Padma Shri in 2022 for his contributions to the preservation and promotion of the Rai folk dance form of Madhya Pradesh.
explanation.tanglish: Ram Sahay Pandey, Madhya Pradesh-in Rai jananaadanathin paadhukaappukku 2022-aam varudathil Padma Shri puraskaram petrar.

archive_data.question_text: In which year was MS Subbulakshmi honoured with the Bharat Ratna?

explanation.english: The legendary Carnatic vocalist MS Subbulakshmi was honoured with the Bharat Ratna, India's highest civilian award, in the year 1998.
explanation.tanglish: Perungarunaataga karnatic isaik kalagnar MS Subbulakshmi, 1998-aam varudam Bharat Ratna puraskarathaal sammanikappattar.

archive_data.question_text: Whom did Gopal Krishna Gokhale call 'the best ambassador of Hindu-Muslim unity'?

explanation.english: Gopal Krishna Gokhale described Mohammad Ali Jinnah as the 'best ambassador of Hindu-Muslim unity' for his role in promoting communal harmony during the early years.
explanation.tanglish: Gopal Krishna Gokhale, Mohammad Ali Jinnah-ai 'Hindu-Muslim aikkiyathin siranthu doothar' endru solliyaar, aarama vayathil saamuga samadhaanathukku avar seitha thondugal karanamaaga.

archive_data.question_text: During the sixth century BCE, as part of the 'Shraman' tradition, which of the following new religious and social movements began in the Gangetic valley?

explanation.english: Buddhism emerged in the 6th century BCE in the Gangetic valley as a new religious movement within the Shraman tradition, offering an alternative to Vedic Brahmanism.
explanation.tanglish: 6-am noottandu BCE-il Gangai vazhikaattil, Sramana sampradhaya vaariyil oru puthu mathamaaga Bouddha matham thondiyadhu. Idhu veitha bramanathukku oru marpathaiyaga amaindhu.

archive_data.question_text: The historic Asamai temple is located in __________ in Afghanistan.

explanation.english: The historic Asamai temple, dedicated to the goddess Asamai, is situated in the city of Kabul, Afghanistan.
explanation.tanglish: Aasamai ammanukku arpikkappatta chariththira maana Aasamai kovil, Afghanistan-in Kabul pattinathil amaindhu irukkiradhu.
